gxio/mpipe.h File Reference

An API for allocating, configuring, and manipulating mPIPE hardware resources. More...


Data Structures

struct  gxio_mpipe_context_t
 A context object used to manage mPIPE hardware resources. More...
struct  gxio_mpipe_rules_t
 A set of classifier rules, plus a context. More...
struct  gxio_mpipe_iqueue_t
 A convenient interface to a NotifRing, for use by a single thread. More...
struct  gxio_mpipe_equeue_t
 A convenient, thread-safe interface to an eDMA ring. More...
struct  gxio_mpipe_link_t
 An object used to manage mPIPE link state and resources. More...

Defines

#define GXIO_MPIPE_BDESC_IS_VALID(_bdesc)
 Check if a buffer descriptor is valid.
#define GXIO_MPIPE_CONTEXT(_n)   gxio_mpipe_context[_n]
 gxio mPIPE contexts.

Typedefs

typedef MPIPE_PDESC_t gxio_mpipe_idesc_t
 An ingress packet descriptor.
typedef MPIPE_EDMA_DESC_t gxio_mpipe_edesc_t
 An egress command descriptor.
typedef MPIPE_BSM_REGION_VAL_t gxio_mpipe_bdesc_t
 A mPIPE buffer descriptor.

Enumerations

enum  gxio_mpipe_alloc_flags_e { GXIO_MPIPE_ALLOC_FIXED = HV_MPIPE_ALLOC_FIXED }
 Flags that can be passed to resource allocation functions. More...
enum  gxio_mpipe_mem_flags_e { GXIO_MPIPE_MEM_FLAG_NT_HINT = IORPC_MEM_BUFFER_FLAG_NT_HINT, GXIO_MPIPE_MEM_FLAG_IO_PIN = IORPC_MEM_BUFFER_FLAG_IO_PIN }
 Flags that can be passed to memory registration functions. More...
enum  gxio_mpipe_mode_flags_e { GXIO_MPIPE_RHWB = 0x01, GXIO_MPIPE_MULTI_MPIPES = 0x02 }
 Flags of mpipe mode. More...
enum  gxio_mpipe_buffer_size_enum_t {
  GXIO_MPIPE_BUFFER_SIZE_128 = MPIPE_BSM_INIT_DAT_1__SIZE_VAL_BSZ_128, GXIO_MPIPE_BUFFER_SIZE_256 = MPIPE_BSM_INIT_DAT_1__SIZE_VAL_BSZ_256, GXIO_MPIPE_BUFFER_SIZE_512 = MPIPE_BSM_INIT_DAT_1__SIZE_VAL_BSZ_512, GXIO_MPIPE_BUFFER_SIZE_1024 = MPIPE_BSM_INIT_DAT_1__SIZE_VAL_BSZ_1024,
  GXIO_MPIPE_BUFFER_SIZE_1664 = MPIPE_BSM_INIT_DAT_1__SIZE_VAL_BSZ_1664, GXIO_MPIPE_BUFFER_SIZE_4096 = MPIPE_BSM_INIT_DAT_1__SIZE_VAL_BSZ_4096, GXIO_MPIPE_BUFFER_SIZE_10368 = MPIPE_BSM_INIT_DAT_1__SIZE_VAL_BSZ_10368, GXIO_MPIPE_BUFFER_SIZE_16384 = MPIPE_BSM_INIT_DAT_1__SIZE_VAL_BSZ_16384
}
 Enum codes for buffer sizes supported by mPIPE. More...
enum  gxio_mpipe_bucket_mode_t {
  GXIO_MPIPE_BUCKET_DYNAMIC_FLOW_AFFINITY, GXIO_MPIPE_BUCKET_STATIC_FLOW_AFFINITY, GXIO_MPIPE_BUCKET_ROUND_ROBIN, GXIO_MPIPE_BUCKET_STICKY_FLOW_LOCALITY,
  GXIO_MPIPE_BUCKET_PREFER_FLOW_LOCALITY
}
 The legal modes for gxio_mpipe_bucket_info_t and gxio_mpipe_init_notif_group_and_buckets(). More...
enum  { GXIO_MPIPE_IQUEUE_ENTRY_128 = 128, GXIO_MPIPE_IQUEUE_ENTRY_512 = 512, GXIO_MPIPE_IQUEUE_ENTRY_2K = 2048, GXIO_MPIPE_IQUEUE_ENTRY_64K = (64 * 1024) }
 Enum for iqueue entry counts supported by mPIPE. More...
enum  { GXIO_MPIPE_EQUEUE_ENTRY_512 = 512, GXIO_MPIPE_EQUEUE_ENTRY_2K = 2048, GXIO_MPIPE_EQUEUE_ENTRY_8K = 8192, GXIO_MPIPE_EQUEUE_ENTRY_64K = 0x10000 }
 Enum code for equeue entries supported by mPIPE. More...
enum  gxio_mpipe_equeue_priority_enum_t { GXIO_MPIPE_EDMA_PRIORITY_LOW, GXIO_MPIPE_EDMA_PRIORITY_MED, GXIO_MPIPE_EDMA_PRIORITY_HIGH }
 Enum codes for edma priority supported by mPIPE. More...

Functions

unsigned char * gxio_mpipe_idesc_get_va (gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Get the "va" field from an "idesc".
unsigned int gxio_mpipe_idesc_get_xfer_size (gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Get the "xfer_size" from an "idesc".
uint32_t gxio_mpipe_idesc_get_flow_hash (gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Get the "flow_hash" from an "idesc".
uint16_t gxio_mpipe_idesc_get_vlan (gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Get the "vlan" from an "idesc".
uint16_t gxio_mpipe_idesc_get_ethertype (gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Get the "ethertype" from an "idesc".
uint8_t gxio_mpipe_idesc_get_l2_offset (gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Get the "l2_offset" from an "idesc".
unsigned char * gxio_mpipe_idesc_get_l2_start (gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Get the "l2_start" from an "idesc".
unsigned int gxio_mpipe_idesc_get_l2_length (gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Get the "l2_length" from an "idesc".
uint8_t gxio_mpipe_idesc_get_l3_offset (gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Get the "l3_offset" from an "idesc".
unsigned char * gxio_mpipe_idesc_get_l3_start (gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Get the "l3_start" from an "idesc".
unsigned int gxio_mpipe_idesc_get_l3_length (gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Get the "l3_length" from an "idesc".
uint8_t gxio_mpipe_idesc_get_l4_offset (gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Get the "l4_offset" from an "idesc".
unsigned char * gxio_mpipe_idesc_get_l4_start (gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Get the "l4_start" from an "idesc".
unsigned int gxio_mpipe_idesc_get_l4_length (gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Get the "l4_length" from an "idesc".
uint8_t gxio_mpipe_idesc_get_status (gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Get the "status" from an "idesc".
int gxio_mpipe_idesc_has_error (gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Determine if a packet descriptor has an "error" flag.
int gxio_mpipe_idesc_is_bad (gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Determine if a packet descriptor is "bad".
void gxio_mpipe_edesc_copy_idesc (gxio_mpipe_edesc_t *edesc, gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Initialize an "edesc" from some fields in an "idesc".
gxio_mpipe_bdesc_t gxio_mpipe_idesc_to_bdesc (gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Extract buffer descriptor from some fields in an "idesc".
void gxio_mpipe_edesc_set_bdesc (gxio_mpipe_edesc_t *edesc, gxio_mpipe_bdesc_t bdesc)
 Set buffer info.
void gxio_mpipe_edesc_set_va (gxio_mpipe_edesc_t *edesc, void *va)
 Set the "va" field in an "edesc".
int gxio_mpipe_init (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int mpipe_instance)
 Initialize an mPIPE context.
int gxio_mpipe_destroy (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context)
 Destroy an mPIPE context.
int gxio_mpipe_alloc_buffer_stacks (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int count, unsigned int first, unsigned int flags)
 Allocate a set of buffer stacks.
gxio_mpipe_buffer_size_enum_t gxio_mpipe_buffer_size_to_buffer_size_enum (size_t size)
 Convert a buffer size in bytes into a buffer size enum.
size_t gxio_mpipe_buffer_size_enum_to_buffer_size (gxio_mpipe_buffer_size_enum_t buffer_size_enum)
 Convert a buffer size enum into a buffer size in bytes.
size_t gxio_mpipe_calc_buffer_stack_bytes (unsigned long buffers)
 Calculate the number of bytes required to store a given number of buffers in the memory registered with a buffer stack via gxio_mpipe_init_buffer_stack().
int gxio_mpipe_init_buffer_stack (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int stack, gxio_mpipe_buffer_size_enum_t buffer_size_enum, void *mem, size_t mem_size, unsigned int mem_flags)
 Initialize a buffer stack.
int gxio_mpipe_register_page (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int stack, void *page, size_t page_size, unsigned int page_flags)
 Register a page in the context's IOTLB.
void gxio_mpipe_push_buffer_bdesc (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, gxio_mpipe_bdesc_t bdesc)
 Push a buffer using buffer descriptor.
gxio_mpipe_bdesc_t gxio_mpipe_pop_buffer_bdesc (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int stack)
 Pop a buffer off of a previously initialized buffer stack and return the buffer descriptor.
void gxio_mpipe_push_buffer (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int stack, void *buffer)
 Push a buffer onto a previously initialized buffer stack.
void * gxio_mpipe_pop_buffer (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int stack)
 Pop a buffer off of a previously initialized buffer stack.
int gxio_mpipe_alloc_notif_rings (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int count, unsigned int first, unsigned int flags)
 Allocate a set of NotifRings.
int gxio_mpipe_init_notif_ring (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int ring, void *mem, size_t mem_size, unsigned int mem_flags)
 Initialize a NotifRing, using the given memory and size.
int gxio_mpipe_alloc_notif_groups (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int count, unsigned int first, unsigned int flags)
 Allocate a set of NotifGroups.
void gxio_mpipe_notif_group_add_ring (gxio_mpipe_notif_group_bits_t *bits, int ring)
 Add a NotifRing to a NotifGroup.
int gxio_mpipe_init_notif_group (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int group, gxio_mpipe_notif_group_bits_t bits)
 Set a particular NotifGroup bitmask.
int gxio_mpipe_alloc_buckets (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int count, unsigned int first, unsigned int flags)
 Allocate a set of load balancer buckets.
int gxio_mpipe_init_bucket (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int bucket, gxio_mpipe_bucket_info_t bucket_info)
 Copy a set of bucket initialization values into the mPIPE hardware.
int gxio_mpipe_init_notif_group_and_buckets (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int group, unsigned int ring, unsigned int num_rings, unsigned int bucket, unsigned int num_buckets, gxio_mpipe_bucket_mode_t mode)
 Initializes a group and range of buckets and range of rings such that the load balancer runs a particular load balancing function.
void gxio_mpipe_credit (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, int ring, int bucket, unsigned int count)
 Return credits to a NotifRing and/or bucket.
int gxio_mpipe_alloc_edma_rings (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int count, unsigned int first, unsigned int flags)
 Allocate a set of eDMA rings.
int gxio_mpipe_init_edma_ring (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int ering, unsigned int channel, void *mem, size_t mem_size, unsigned int mem_flags)
 Initialize an eDMA ring, using the given memory and size.
int gxio_mpipe_config_edma_ring_blks (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int ering, unsigned int max_blks, unsigned int min_snf_blks, unsigned int db)
 Set the "max_blks", "min_snf_blks", and "db" fields of MPIPE_EDMA_RG_INIT_DAT_THRESH_t for a given edma ring.
int gxio_mpipe_classifier_load_from_file (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, const char *path)
 Load a classifier binary from a file.
int gxio_mpipe_classifier_load_from_bytes (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, const void *blob, size_t blob_size)
 Load a classifier binary from some bytes.
int gxio_mpipe_classifier_customize (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, const char *symbol, const void *data, size_t len)
 Customize a customized classifier.
void gxio_mpipe_rules_init (gxio_mpipe_rules_t *rules, gxio_mpipe_context_t *context)
 Initialize a classifier program rules list.
int gxio_mpipe_rules_begin (gxio_mpipe_rules_t *rules, unsigned int bucket, unsigned int num_buckets, gxio_mpipe_rules_stacks_t *stacks)
 Begin a new rule on the indicated rules list.
int gxio_mpipe_rules_set_priority (gxio_mpipe_rules_t *rules, int priority)
 Set the priority of the current rule.
int gxio_mpipe_rules_set_headroom (gxio_mpipe_rules_t *rules, uint8_t headroom)
 Set the headroom of the current rule.
int gxio_mpipe_rules_set_tailroom (gxio_mpipe_rules_t *rules, uint8_t tailroom)
 Set the tailroom of the current rule.
int gxio_mpipe_rules_set_capacity (gxio_mpipe_rules_t *rules, uint16_t capacity)
 Set the capacity of the current rule.
int gxio_mpipe_rules_add_channel (gxio_mpipe_rules_t *rules, unsigned int channel)
 Indicate that packets from a particular channel can be delivered to the buckets and buffer stacks associated with the current rule.
int gxio_mpipe_rules_add_dmac (gxio_mpipe_rules_t *rules, gxio_mpipe_rules_dmac_t dmac)
 Indicate that packets targetting a particular destination MAC address can be delivered to the current rule's buckets and buffer stacks.
int gxio_mpipe_rules_add_vlan (gxio_mpipe_rules_t *rules, gxio_mpipe_rules_vlan_t vlan)
 Indicate that packets with a particular VLAN can be delivered to the current rule's buckets and buffer stacks.
int gxio_mpipe_rules_commit (gxio_mpipe_rules_t *rules)
 Commit rules.
int gxio_mpipe_iqueue_init (gxio_mpipe_iqueue_t *iqueue, gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int ring, void *mem, size_t mem_size, unsigned int mem_flags)
 Initialize an iqueue wrapper.
void gxio_mpipe_iqueue_advance (gxio_mpipe_iqueue_t *iqueue, int count)
 Advance over some old entries in an iqueue.
void gxio_mpipe_iqueue_release (gxio_mpipe_iqueue_t *iqueue, gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Release the ring and bucket for an old entry in an iqueue.
void gxio_mpipe_iqueue_consume (gxio_mpipe_iqueue_t *iqueue, gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Consume a packet from an "iqueue".
int gxio_mpipe_iqueue_try_peek (gxio_mpipe_iqueue_t *iqueue, gxio_mpipe_idesc_t **idesc_ref)
 Peek at the next packet(s) in an "iqueue", without waiting.
int gxio_mpipe_iqueue_peek (gxio_mpipe_iqueue_t *iqueue, gxio_mpipe_idesc_t **idesc_ref)
 Peek at the next packet(s) in an "iqueue", waiting if necessary.
int gxio_mpipe_iqueue_try_get (gxio_mpipe_iqueue_t *iqueue, gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Get the next packet in an "iqueue", if any.
int gxio_mpipe_iqueue_get (gxio_mpipe_iqueue_t *iqueue, gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Get the next packet in an "iqueue", waiting if necessary.
void gxio_mpipe_iqueue_drop (gxio_mpipe_iqueue_t *iqueue, gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Drop a packet by pushing its buffer (if appropriate).
int gxio_mpipe_iqueue_drop_if_bad (gxio_mpipe_iqueue_t *iqueue, gxio_mpipe_idesc_t *idesc)
 Drop a packet if it is "bad".
int gxio_mpipe_iqueue_get_fullness (gxio_mpipe_iqueue_t *iqueue)
 Return the iqueue fullness.
int gxio_mpipe_equeue_init (gxio_mpipe_equeue_t *equeue, gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int ering, unsigned int channel, void *mem, unsigned int mem_size, unsigned int mem_flags)
 Initialize an "equeue".
int64_t gxio_mpipe_equeue_reserve (gxio_mpipe_equeue_t *equeue, unsigned int num)
 Reserve completion slots for edescs.
int64_t gxio_mpipe_equeue_try_reserve (gxio_mpipe_equeue_t *equeue, unsigned int num)
 Reserve completion slots for edescs, if possible.
int64_t gxio_mpipe_equeue_reserve_fast (gxio_mpipe_equeue_t *equeue, unsigned int num)
 Reserve slots for edescs.
int64_t gxio_mpipe_equeue_try_reserve_fast (gxio_mpipe_equeue_t *equeue, unsigned int num)
 Reserve slots for edescs, if possible.
void gxio_mpipe_equeue_put_at (gxio_mpipe_equeue_t *equeue, gxio_mpipe_edesc_t edesc, unsigned long slot)
 Post an edesc to a given slot in an equeue.
int gxio_mpipe_equeue_put (gxio_mpipe_equeue_t *equeue, gxio_mpipe_edesc_t edesc)
 Post an edesc to the next slot in an equeue.
void gxio_mpipe_equeue_flush (gxio_mpipe_equeue_t *equeue)
 Ask the mPIPE hardware to egress outstanding packets immediately.
int gxio_mpipe_equeue_is_complete (gxio_mpipe_equeue_t *equeue, int64_t completion_slot, int update)
 Determine if a given edesc has been completed.
int gxio_mpipe_equeue_set_snf_size (gxio_mpipe_equeue_t *equeue, size_t size)
 Set the snf (store and forward) size for an equeue.
int gxio_mpipe_equeue_set_priority (gxio_mpipe_equeue_t *equeue, gxio_mpipe_equeue_priority_enum_t priority)
 Set the priority level to an eMDA ring.
int gxio_mpipe_equeue_get_priority (gxio_mpipe_equeue_t *equeue)
 Retrieve the priority level of an eDMA ring.
int gxio_mpipe_get_buffer_count (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int stack)
 Retrieve the number of buffers currently in a buffer stack.
int gxio_mpipe_link_instance (const char *link_name)
 Translate a link name to the instance number of the mPIPE shim which is connected to that link.
int gxio_mpipe_link_enumerate (int index, char *link_name)
 Retrieve one of this system's legal link names.
int gxio_mpipe_link_enumerate_mac (int index, char *link_name, uint8_t *mac_addr)
 Retrieve one of this system's legal link names, and its MAC address.
int gxio_mpipe_link_open (gxio_mpipe_link_t *link, gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, const char *link_name, unsigned int flags)
 Open an mPIPE link.
int gxio_mpipe_link_close (gxio_mpipe_link_t *link)
 Close an mPIPE link.
int gxio_mpipe_link_channel (gxio_mpipe_link_t *link)
 Return a link's channel number.
int gxio_mpipe_link_set_attr (gxio_mpipe_link_t *link, uint32_t attr, int64_t val)
 Set a link attribute.
int gxio_mpipe_link_mdio_rd (gxio_mpipe_link_t *link, int dev, int addr)
 Read an MDIO register in a link's PHY.
int gxio_mpipe_link_mdio_wr (gxio_mpipe_link_t *link, int dev, int addr, uint16_t val)
 Write an MDIO register in a link's PHY.
int gxio_mpipe_link_mdio_rd_ex (gxio_mpipe_link_t *link, int phy, int dev, int addr)
 Read an MDIO register.
int gxio_mpipe_link_mdio_wr_ex (gxio_mpipe_link_t *link, int phy, int dev, int addr, uint16_t val)
 Write an MDIO register.
int64_t gxio_mpipe_link_get_attr (gxio_mpipe_link_t *link, uint32_t attr)
 Get a link attribute.
int64_t gxio_mpipe_link_get_lattr (gxio_mpipe_link_t *link, uint32_t attr, size_t offset, void *buf, size_t length)
 Get a long link attribute.
int64_t gxio_mpipe_link_mac_rd (gxio_mpipe_link_t *link, int addr)
 Read a register in a link's MAC.
int gxio_mpipe_link_mac_wr (gxio_mpipe_link_t *link, int addr, uint32_t val)
 Write an MDIO register in a link's MAC.
int gxio_mpipe_link_wait (gxio_mpipe_link_t *link, int timeout)
 Wait for a link to become ready.
int gxio_mpipe_link_get_pollfd (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context)
 Get a file descriptor which may be polled to determine link state changes.
int gxio_mpipe_get_sqn (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, int index)
 Get an mPIPE sequence number.
int gxio_mpipe_config_stats (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, uint32_t command, uint64_t val)
 Configure mPIPE configurable packet drop/performance counters.
int gxio_mpipe_get_stats (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, gxio_mpipe_stats_t *result)
 Get mPIPE statistics.
int gxio_mpipe_get_counter (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, unsigned int index, uint64_t *result)
 Get an mPIPE counter.
int gxio_mpipe_link_arm_pollfd (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, int fd)
 Arm a pollable file descriptor.
int gxio_mpipe_get_timestamp (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, struct timespec *ts)
 Get the current timestamp of the mPIPE.
int gxio_mpipe_set_timestamp (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, const struct timespec *ts)
 Set the timestamp of mPIPE.
int gxio_mpipe_adjust_timestamp (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, int64_t delta)
 Adjust the timestamp of mPIPE.
int gxio_mpipe_adjust_timestamp_freq (gxio_mpipe_context_t *context, int32_t ppb)
 Adjust the mPIPE timestamp clock frequency.

Detailed Description

An API for allocating, configuring, and manipulating mPIPE hardware resources.
